examples: Be consistent with your study habits.
Her performance has been very consistent.
context: I want to go to bed early, wake up early, eat healthy, home cooked food, and be more consistent with my workouts.

examples: I love staying in my cozy bed on rainy days.

context: My low this week was definitely my lack of routines.

examples: She literally ran a marathon yesterday.
